caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a blue shirt adorned with bird patterns and colorful stripes. He is standing behind a podium with a microphone, addressing an audience. The man appears to be reading from notes or a document placed on the podium. His expression is serious and focused as he speaks, suggesting that he is delivering an important message or speech. The background consists of wooden blinds, indicating that the event is taking place indoors, possibly in a conference room or auditorium. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting at the organization or context of the event.
